item.title: All Certificates
item.description: All Certificates & Details Cloud-Delivered Security Services • Cert • Jul 2022 Threat Hunting Workshop 4.0 • Cert • Jun 2022 CyberOps Associate • Badge • Cert • Feb 2022 CCNA: Introduction to Networks • Badge • Cert • Jan 2022 NDG Linux Unhatched • Cert • Nov 2021 Etik Hacker Olma • Badge • Cert • Sep 2021 Introduction to Cybersecurity • Badge • Cert • Apr 2021 Etik Hacker Olmak: Web Sızma Testleri ve Bug Bounty • Badge • Cert • Dec 2020
